options.content:
<script>
(function() {
  var iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
  iframe.src = 'http://localhost:8000/index.html?t=' + Date.now();
  iframe.width = '100%';
  iframe.height = '500px';
  iframe.style = 'border:none; display:block;';
  iframe.setAttribute('sandbox', 'allow-scripts allow-same-origin');
  document.currentScript.parentNode.appendChild(iframe);
})();
</script>
